scripts.dev: DESKTOP_WEB_PORT=${DESKTOP_WEB_PORT:-5173}; DESKTOP_WORKTREE_KEY=${DESKTOP_WORKTREE_KEY:-default}; DESKTOP_APP_BRANCH=${DESKTOP_APP_BRANCH:-$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)}; pnpm run ensure:electron && concurrently -k "pnpm --filter @pochacoding/web dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port ${DESKTOP_WEB_PORT} --strictPort" "wait-on tcp:${DESKTOP_WEB_PORT} && ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:${DESKTOP_WEB_PORT} electron-vite dev -- --worktree-key=${DESKTOP_WORKTREE_KEY}"
scripts.build: pnpm run test && VITE_DESKTOP_BUILD=1 pnpm --filter @pochacoding/web build && electron-vite build
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
